sys_soap_message.description: Used to send the request details to algosec
sys_soap_message.name: Algosec ticket Creation
sys_soap_message.wsdl_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?> <definitions targetNamespace="https://www.algosec.com/WSHandler" name="FireFlowWebService" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:wsp="http://www.w3.org/ns/ws-policy" xmlns:tns="https://www.algosec.com/WSHandler" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsp1_2="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:wsam="http://www.w3.org/2007/05/addressing/metadata" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd"> <types> <xs:schema version="1.0" targetNamespace="https://www.algosec.com/WSHandler" xmlns:tns="https://www.algosec.com/WSHandler" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema">
<xs:element name="createTicket" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="FFWSHeader" type="tns:FFWSHeader" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="sessionId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="ticket" type="tns:ticket" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="createTicketResponse" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="result" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="message" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="ticketDisplayURL" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="ticketId" type="xs:int" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="authenticate" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="FFWSHeader" type="tns:FFWSHeader" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="username" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="password" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="domain" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="authenticateResponse" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="result" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="sessionId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="faSessionId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="phpSessionId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="faToken" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="ldapMemberOfDNs" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="getTicket" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="FFWSHeader" type="tns:FFWSHeader" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="sessionId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="ticketId" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> <xs:element name="getTicketResponse" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="result" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="ticket" type="tns:ticket" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="subTicketIds" type="xs:int" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="parentTicketId" type="xs:int" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="getFields" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="FFWSHeader" type="tns:FFWSHeader" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="sessionId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="ticketId" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="fields" type="tns:fields" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="getFieldsResponse" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="result" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="fields" type="tns:customField" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="getTemplateFields" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="FFWSHeader" type="tns:FFWSHeader" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="sessionId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="getTemplateFieldsResponse" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="template" type="tns:templateCFs" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="isSessionAlive" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="FFWSHeader" type="tns:FFWSHeader" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="sessionId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="isSessionAliveResponse" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="result" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="updateObjectCustomField" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="FFWSHeader" type="tns:FFWSHeader" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="sessionId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="objectType" type="tns:objectType" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="objectId" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="customField" type="tns:customField" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="updateObjectCustomFieldResponse" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="result" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <!-- result values: 1 for success, 0 for failure --> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="addObjectCustomField" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="FFWSHeader" type="tns:FFWSHeader" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="sessionId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="objectType" type="tns:objectType" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="objectId" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="customField" type="tns:customField" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="addObjectCustomFieldResponse" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="result" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <!-- result values: 1 for success, 0 for failure --> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="deleteObjectCustomField" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="FFWSHeader" type="tns:FFWSHeader" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="sessionId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="objectType" type="tns:objectType" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="objectId" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="customField" type="tns:customField" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:element name="deleteObjectCustomFieldResponse" nillable="false" > <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="result" type="xs:int" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <!-- result values: 1 for success, 0 for failure --> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<xs:complexType name="FFWSHeader"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="version" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="opaque" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="ticket"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="template" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="attachments" type="tns:attachment" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="cc" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="customFields" type="tns:customField" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="description" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="devices" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="due" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="expire" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="externalId" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="owner" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="priority" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="refersTo" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="referredBy" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="requestor" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="requestorEmail" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="subject" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="trafficLines" type="tns:trafficLine" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="objectChangeLines" type="tns:objectChangeLine" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="status" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="id" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="domain" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="fields"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="key" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <!-- Allowed Keys: --> <!-- All user-defined custom fields under cateogry "additional" --> <!-- All user-defined custom fields under cateogry "external API" --> <!-- The following fields: id status subject requestor requestorEmail owner cc due expire priority devices template description domain externalId refersTo referredBy owning group additional responsible groups --> <xs:complexType name="templateCFs"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="name" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="type" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="enabled" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="customField" type="tns:customFieldData" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="customFieldData"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="name" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="displayName" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="type" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="maxValues" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="category" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="defaultValue" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="validation" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="customField"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="key" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="values" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="attachment"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="fileName" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="fileContent" type="xs:base64Binary" nillable="true" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="trafficLine"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="action" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element name="customFields" type="tns:customField" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="nat" type="tns:trafficNAT" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="trafficDestination" type="tns:trafficAddress" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="trafficService" type="tns:trafficService" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="trafficSource" type="tns:trafficAddress" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="trafficUser" type="tns:trafficUser" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="trafficApplication" type="tns:trafficApplication" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="trafficLineOriginalId" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="trafficNAT"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="destination" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="port" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="source" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="type" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="trafficAddress"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="address" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="customFields" type="tns:customField" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="trafficService"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="customFields" type="tns:customField" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="service" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="trafficUser"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="customFields" type="tns:customField" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="user" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="trafficApplication"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="customFields" type="tns:customField" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="application" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:complexType name="objectChangeLine"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="action" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="objectType" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="objectName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="actionTarget" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="values" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="customFields" type="tns:customField" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="scope" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<xs:simpleType name="objectType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="ticket" /> <xs:enumeration value="user" /> <xs:enumeration value="group" /> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType>
<xs:element name="ErrorDetails"> <xs:complexType> <xs:all> <xs:element name="code" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="description" type="xs:string" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> </xs:all> </xs:complexType> </xs:element> </xs:schema> </types>
<message name="createTicket"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:createTicket"/> </message>
<message name="createTicketResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:createTicketResponse"/> </message>
<message name="getTicket"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:getTicket"/> </message> <message name="getTicketResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:getTicketResponse"/> </message> <message name="getFields"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:getFields"/> </message> <message name="getFieldsResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:getFieldsResponse"/> </message> <message name="getTemplateFields"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:getTemplateFields"/> </message> <message name="getTemplateFieldsResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:getTemplateFieldsResponse"/> </message>
<message name="authenticate"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:authenticate"/> </message>
<message name="authenticateResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:authenticateResponse"/> </message>
<message name="isSessionAlive"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:isSessionAlive"/> </message>
<message name="isSessionAliveResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:isSessionAliveResponse"/> </message>
<message name="updateObjectCustomField"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:updateObjectCustomField"/> </message>
<message name="updateObjectCustomFieldResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:updateObjectCustomFieldResponse"/> </message>
<message name="addObjectCustomField"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:addObjectCustomField"/> </message>
<message name="addObjectCustomFieldResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:addObjectCustomFieldResponse"/> </message>
<message name="deleteObjectCustomField"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:deleteObjectCustomField"/> </message>
<message name="deleteObjectCustomFieldResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:deleteObjectCustomFieldResponse"/> </message>
<message name="error"> <part name="details" element="tns:ErrorDetails"/> </message>
<portType name="FireFlowWebServicePortType"> <operation name="createTicket"> <input message="tns:createTicket"/> <output message="tns:createTicketResponse"/> <fault message="tns:error" name="FireFlowError"/> </operation> <operation name="getTicket"> <input message="tns:getTicket" /> <output message="tns:getTicketResponse" /> <fault message="tns:error" name="FireFlowError" /> </operation> <operation name="getFields"> <input message="tns:getFields" /> <output message="tns:getFieldsResponse" /> <fault message="tns:error" name="FireFlowError" /> </operation> <operation name="getTemplateFields"> <input message="tns:getTemplateFields" /> <output message="tns:getTemplateFieldsResponse" /> <fault message="tns:error" name="FireFlowError" /> </operation> <operation name="authenticate"> <input message="tns:authenticate" /> <output message="tns:authenticateResponse" /> </operation> <operation name="isSessionAlive"> <input message="tns:isSessionAlive" /> <output message="tns:isSessionAliveResponse" /> </operation> <operation name="updateObjectCustomField"> <input message="tns:updateObjectCustomField" /> <output message="tns:updateObjectCustomFieldResponse" /> <fault message="tns:error" name="FireFlowError" /> </operation> <operation name="addObjectCustomField"> <input message="tns:addObjectCustomField" /> <output message="tns:addObjectCustomFieldResponse" /> <fault message="tns:error" name="FireFlowError" /> </operation> <operation name="deleteObjectCustomField"> <input message="tns:deleteObjectCustomField" /> <output message="tns:deleteObjectCustomFieldResponse" /> <fault message="tns:error" name="FireFlowError" /> </operation> </portType>
<binding name="FireFlowWebServiceBinding" type="tns:FireFlowWebServicePortType"> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http" style="document"/> <operation name="createTicket"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> <fault name="FireFlowError"> <soap:fault name="FireFlowError" use="literal"/> </fault> </operation> <operation name="getTicket"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> <fault name="FireFlowError"> <soap:fault name="FireFlowError" use="literal"/> </fault> </operation> <operation name="getFields"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> <fault name="FireFlowError"> <soap:fault name="FireFlowError" use="literal"/> </fault> </operation> <operation name="getTemplateFields"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> <fault name="FireFlowError"> <soap:fault name="FireFlowError" use="literal"/> </fault> </operation> <operation name="authenticate"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="isSessionAlive"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="updateObjectCustomField"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> <fault name="FireFlowError"> <soap:fault name="FireFlowError" use="literal"/> </fault> </operation> <operation name="addObjectCustomField"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> <fault name="FireFlowError"> <soap:fault name="FireFlowError" use="literal"/> </fault> </operation> <operation name="deleteObjectCustomField"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> <fault name="FireFlowError"> <soap:fault name="FireFlowError" use="literal"/> </fault> </operation> </binding>
<service name="FireFlowWebServiceService"> <documentation>FireFlow Web Services</documentation> <port name="FireFlowWebServicePort" binding="tns:FireFlowWebServiceBinding"> <soap:address location="https://10.80.122.122/WebServices/WSDispatcher.pl"/> </port> </service>
</definitions>
